title: Semi3D
description: Gives 3D using flat plane layers on blocks.
body:
# Add depth to blocks without cubes
_Does this by using planes in smart ways._
##
 - Sugarcane each cane is it's own cross section.
 - Ladders and rails use 2 planes to add depth to each part of the block.

## Not in light version
 - Several cubes use a second layer on top or inside to add depth.
##
The pack uses a shader and a special universal model for blocks to add more blocks

The shader was done with help from [Shock Micro](https://twitter.com/ShockMicro).

She does really really awesome shader stuff, that I even recommend playing with if you like this pack.
